ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon_species" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the Pokémon species */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon species in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon species in kilograms */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points for the Pokémon species */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the Pokémon species in the Pokédex */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon species is the default form */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation of the Pokémon */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary color of the Pokémon */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape of the Pokémon */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat of the Pokémon */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon is mythical */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Capture rate of the Pokémon */,
  "base_happiness" INTEGER /* Base happiness of the Pokémon */,
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth rate of the Pokémon */,
  "egg_groups" TEXT /* Egg groups of the Pokémon */,
  "male_female_ratio" TEXT /* Male-to-female ratio of the Pokémon */,
  "hatch_counter" INTEGER /* Number of steps required to hatch the Pokémon's egg */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* Abilities of the Pokémon */,
  "hidden_ability" TEXT /* Hidden ability of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon type (e.g., Fire, Water, Grass) */,
  "is_dual_type" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type can be part of a dual-type combination */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the type against other types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_type_relations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon-type relation */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon type */,
  "slot" INTEGER /* Slot of the type (1 or 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_relations_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_relations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species that evolves */,
  "evolves_from_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species it evolves from */,
  "evolves_into_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species it evolves into */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, trade, item) */,
  "min_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required for evolution */,
  "required_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required item for evolution */,
  "required_happiness" INTEGER /* Required happiness for evolution */,
  "required_beauty" INTEGER /* Required beauty for evolution */,
  "required_affection" INTEGER /* Required affection for evolution */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Required time of day for evolution */,
  "known_move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required move for evolution */,
  "known_move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required move type for evolution */,
  "relative_stats" TEXT /* Required relative stats for evolution */,
  "needs_overworld_rain" INTEGER /* Indicates if evolution requires overworld rain */,
  "turn_upside_down" INTEGER /* Indicates if evolution requires turning the Pokémon upside down */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolves_from_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolves_from_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolves_into_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolves_into_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trainer, researcher) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "team_composition" TEXT /* User's current Pokémon team composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the platform */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, favorite, catch) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made during the interaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_statistics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle statistic entry */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the Pokémon species */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the Pokémon species */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the Pokémon species */,
  "total_battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles the Pokémon has participated in */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the Pokémon */,
  "average_battle_time" REAL /* Average time of battles the Pokémon has participated in */,
  "most_common_opponent" TEXT /* Most common opponent Pokémon */,
  "last_battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the last battle the Pokémon participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_statistics_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("id")
)
